files.patch:
@@ -92,7 +92,6 @@
     "description": "Modules permitted to call through to host glibc in interpose (LD_PRELOAD) mode. These modules have not yet been fully reimplemented.",
     "modules": [
       "c11threads_abi",
-      "errno_abi",
       "fortify_abi",
       "glibc_internal_abi",
       "io_internal_abi",
@@ -108,13 +107,11 @@
       "dlfcn_abi",
       "io_abi",
       "time_abi",
-      "termios_abi",
       "resource_abi",
       "dirent_abi",
       "startup_abi",
       "inet_abi",
       "locale_abi",
-      "string_abi",
       "wchar_abi",
       "None"
     ],
@@ -123,19 +120,13 @@
   "callthrough_families": {
     "source": "replacement_guard_source_scan",
     "modules": [
-      "errno_abi",
-      "fortify_abi",
       "glibc_internal_abi",
-      "io_internal_abi",
       "malloc_abi",
       "process_abi",
       "pthread_abi",
       "rpc_abi",
-      "signal_abi",
       "stdio_abi",
       "stdlib_abi",
-      "string_abi",
-      "termios_abi",
       "unistd_abi"
     ],
     "require_fixture_coverage": true
@@ -177,239 +168,231 @@
     "description": "Current census of direct host libc/host pthread escape hatches by ABI module, as scanned by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh.",
     "modules": {

-        "count": 1,
-        "functions": [
-          "__errno_location"
-        ],
-        "note": "Intentional host errno sync in interpose mode; cfg-guarded out in standalone/replacement builds."

+        "note": "Host errno mirroring is routed through host_resolve helper state; no _abi.rs scan hits remain."

+    "total_call_throughs": 221,
     "note": "Census tracks direct host call-through scan patterns used by scripts/check_replacement_guard.sh."

   },
   "fixtures": [
     {
